title: 1st Love Irony (Netoge x Oreimo)
description:
I'm sure everyone noticed Oreimo and Netoge's OPs sound EXTREMELY similar, so I made this as soon as I found the instrumental version of Netoge's.

(Music is from the Netoge OP, 1st Love Story , vocals are from the Oreimo OP, Irony)
tags: Ore no Imouto ga Konna ni Kawaii Wake ga Nai
netoge no yome wa onnanoko ja nai to omotta
